title: Set Cookie
description: Create a cookie that expires in one hour using setcookie().
problemStatement:
Store data on the client! Use `setcookie()` to create a cookie named `"theme"` with the value `"dark"`, set to expire in 1 hour (3600 seconds from now).

**Requirement:** Use the `time()` function to calculate the expiration.
expectedOutput: Cookie 'theme' is set to expire in 1 hour
